item.title: I think I can
item.description: I am an accomplished carpenter of 25 years. I have worked for my state for 2 years seasonally after ditching the construction gig because it was killing my body. I just want to crush this interview. Yikes!!

item.title: Bottom shelf dump of memes and judgment.
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yooooooooooooooooooo.
ONLY ONE WEEK LEFT TO MAIL YOUR GIFT TO YOUR SECRET SANTA MATCH!! Don't give your money to Bezos this year. Instead, why don't we support our Imgur entrepreneurs? If you are a creator, you can promote your merchandise on discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka in our #shameless-self-promos channel. (Please be sure to pick up the "Creator" role in onboarding) If you're not a creator, you are still invited to join to support our Imgurian artists! WE HAVE CREATORS WHO WOULD LOVE TO HELP MAKE YOU THAT PERFECT GIFT. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Bottom Shelf Vodcar had been parked for months until we could afford to get her fixed. I forgot how low she was on gas by the time I got her back.
Mr. Nutcracker tax.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Ol Musky tries to make an AI to get lulz and spread bullshit, instead it GOeS WokE
item.description:
Twitter Goblins pay $16 a month to ask terrible questions, hoping to see their terrible worldviews reflected back, instead get a small dosage of factual challenge. Some names redacted so alt-right ghouls don't get more traffic.
"Politically neutral"
item.dc:creator: BeetBoxer

item.title: It Was Always About Controlling Women
item.description: https://x.com/MollyJongFast/status/1734399616731226288?s=20 Thankfully she’s escaped from Howdy Arabia and is now getting the care she needs, but I doubt she’ll be able to set foot there again in the near future. And what’s happening here will happen all across America if you ever let the GQP win again, because they *will* ban it nationally. States Rights was always a Lie. And you’ll have US AG Ken Paxton under Donald Trump or whoever, chasing people down in New England and California. You have been fucking warned.
item.dc:creator: Thelrishlnquistion

item.title: Thoughts on this?
item.description:
https://www.reddit.com/r/facepalm/comments/18gt49c/helluva_good_idea/
The response on reddit reads: People have to realize by now that "GOTCHA!" doesnt work on republicans. The leadership most likely anticipated and hoped for something like this, because this will allow them to soapbox and raise donations about how unfaithful and satanic and godless people are becoming and they need every jesus-warrior to show up and give donations and vote and help keep the country pure and white and everything right. There is no way to convince republican with logic and reason, because their arguments and conclusions aren't based in logic and reason. its emotion and greed. The left keeps continuing the same ol tactic from the 90s. Clever remarks and appeal to logic and reason by pointing out hypocrisy. They watch late night shows like daily show and talk hosts make fun of the republican politicians, laugh and point fingers and call the right dumb dumbs. But the right is the group that continuously shows up and votes, they are the ones that despite being at best 25-28% of the country, have amassed 50% control of congress. They enacted abortion bans and are actively pushing policies stripping people of their rights. Yet Left continues to point and laugh "hahahahaha see they so stupid!". But when voting time comes, they sit back down and watch more infortainment if any or just straight intant gratification things like gaming or porn. In 2022, only 20% of elligible voters under the age of 35 voted. Only 100m Voted while 150m elligible voters did not vote. Thats 3x as many voters as either party got. Republican politicians dont give a shit that you laugh at them, they are working hard to gain more control so you will become a slave for them. They want you to think of them as dumb and silly. They raise money off of such ridicule.
item.dc:creator: DCA4242

item.title: The 367th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - D&D MeeMays ep 2
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Starting January 1st, I will have a new Signature Image. One I had commissioned. It's so cute. FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #DandD #DandDump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon
